args.query:
SELECT 
  ch.oldvalue__c as from_agent,
  COUNT(*) as transfer_count
FROM casehistory__c ch
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
  AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10'
  AND ch.createddate <= '2023-04-10'
  AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
  AND ch.oldvalue__c != 'None'
  AND TRIM(ch.oldvalue__c) != ''
GROUP BY ch.oldvalue__c
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC
LIMIT 20

exec_args.sql:
SELECT 
  ch.oldvalue__c as from_agent,
  COUNT(*) as transfer_count
FROM casehistory__c ch
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
  AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10'
  AND ch.createddate <= '2023-04-10'
  AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
  AND ch.oldvalue__c != 'None'
  AND TRIM(ch.oldvalue__c) != ''
GROUP BY ch.oldvalue__c
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC
LIMIT 20

args.query:
WITH transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(ch.oldvalue__c) as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
    AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND ch.createddate <= '2023-04-10'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND TRIM(ch.oldvalue__c) != ''
    AND ch.oldvalue__c != 'None'
  GROUP BY TRIM(ch.oldvalue__c)
),
case_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count
  FROM "Case" c
  GROUP BY TRIM(c.ownerid)
)
SELECT 
  tc.agent_id,
  tc.transfer_count,
  COALESCE(cc.case_count, 0) as case_count
FROM transfer_counts tc
LEFT JOIN case_counts cc ON tc.agent_id = cc.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(cc.case_count, 0) > 0
ORDER BY tc.transfer_count ASC, tc.agent_id

exec_args.sql:
WITH transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(ch.oldvalue__c) as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
    AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND ch.createddate <= '2023-04-10'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND TRIM(ch.oldvalue__c) != ''
    AND ch.oldvalue__c != 'None'
  GROUP BY TRIM(ch.oldvalue__c)
),
case_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count
  FROM "Case" c
  GROUP BY TRIM(c.ownerid)
)
SELECT 
  tc.agent_id,
  tc.transfer_count,
  COALESCE(cc.case_count, 0) as case_count
FROM transfer_counts tc
LEFT JOIN case_counts cc ON tc.agent_id = cc.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(cc.case_count, 0) > 0
ORDER BY tc.transfer_count ASC, tc.agent_id
